vocab.meaning: vốn dĩ gây bối rối, rắc rối
vocab.example: Theoretical physics is inherently perplexing because it deals with concepts that defy our everyday intuition.
I struggled immensely to wrap my head around every abstract theorem presented in my advanced calculus class.

vocab.meaning: làm nản chí, làm lo sợ
vocab.example: The sheer volume of dates and names to memorize in history can often daunt even the most dedicated students.
The labyrinthine rules of grammar in certain foreign languages make them incredibly taxing to master.

vocab.meaning: khác thường, ngược lại với kỳ vọng tự nhiên
vocab.example: Many economic principles are counter-intuitive, which is why I found the subject so grueling at first.
For me, formal logic was a major intellectual hurdle that required months of rigorous practice to overcome.

vocab.meaning: vượt quá khả năng thấu hiểu
vocab.example: No matter how many times I re-read the textbook, the nuances of philosophy remained just beyond my grasp.

vocab.meaning: gây mệt mỏi, đòi hỏi nhiều nỗ lực
vocab.example: Analyzing long-form data sets is mentally taxing and requires a level of patience that I simply don't possess.

vocab.meaning: rơi vào trạng thái chững lại (không tiến bộ thêm được)
vocab.example: I seemed to hit a plateau in my language learning where the advanced vocabulary just wouldn't stick.

vocab.meaning: nhiệm vụ gian khổ, khó khăn
vocab.example: Deciphering ancient manuscripts is an arduous task that demands both sharp eyes and immense historical knowledge.
